title: OPL in talks to sell stake to AvenuesAI, eyes AI
description: In what could be one of the most strategic moves at the intersection of digital lending and artificial intelligence, Online PSB Loans Limited (OPL) -- the operator of India's largest public-sector-backed digital credit platform -- is in advanced negotiations to induct AvenuesAI Limited as a minority stakeholder by way of secondary share sale.
content: New Delhi [India], May 29 (ANI): In what could be one of the most strategic moves at the intersection of digital lending and artificial intelligence, Online PSB Loans Limited (OPL) -- the operator of India's largest public-sector-backed digital credi... [2638 chars]

title: Vibe Marketing vs. Traditional Marketing: How AI Is Reshaping Brand Visual Creation
description: The marketing landscape is undergoing a profound transformation as artificial intelligence (AI) reshapes how brands communicate visually with their audiences. At the heart of this evolution lies a fundamental shift from traditional marketing paradigms toward what is increasingly recognized as “Vibe Marketing.” This new approach redefines the role of visuals—not as mere campaign afterthoughts but as the foundational expression of a brand’s emotional and aesthetic identity. Understanding this shift is crucial for brands aiming to thrive in a world where AI scales visual content production and distribution at unprecedented speed and volume.

title: Why AI capability is becoming the most valuable skill in the economy
description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping how economic value is created, making AI capability a premium skill across industries. Companies are reorganising around speed, scale, and execution, placing builders closer to core decisions. Talent is increasingly judged by what gets built rather than whats listed on paper, a reality reflected in ET AI Hackathon 2.0, where real problems and working solutions are the benchmark of high-value AI capability.

title: Assessment Tool to Help Organizations Secure and Govern AI at Scale
description: Hyderabad (Telangana) [India], May 29: EC-Council, the global credentialing body responsible for the internationally recognized Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) certification and one of the world's leading authorities in cybersecurity education, workforce development, and standards-based training, has today announced the launch of its proprietary Adopt. Defend. Govern. (ADG) AI Framework and a free AI Readiness Self-Assessment Tool to help organizations securely adopt, operationalize, and govern artificial intelligence at scale.

title: How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment
description: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity”) is a clarion call to all people to act with courage and solidarity as we enter an age already being transformed by artificial intelligence, the greatest change in…

title: How to enroll in Tesda’s free online AI and digital skills courses
description: MANILA, Philippines — Filipinos who want to learn artificial intelligence, entrepreneurship, and other digital skills may now enroll for free through the Technical Education and Skills Development Authority Online Program after Tesda partnered with Unesco-UNEVOC and the HP Foundation to expand access to future-ready training programs.
